   - **Gourmet Dining Experiences** - This appears to map to 'Fine Dining Experience' which has a rating of 10 in both activities and restaurants sections.

   - **Flexible Cancellation Policy** - This also doesn't appear in the ground-truth ratings.

Given the limitations, I'll map only the items that have clear matches in the ground-truth data.
